resources.string: Search everything from one place

The magnifier on the overview searches domains, Workers, R2 buckets, D1 databases, KV namespaces and tunnels at once — tap a result to go straight there. And any resource can now be starred to the overview.
Alert center
The overview now gathers what needs attention — inactive domains, tunnels in a bad state and more — into a single card. Tap an item to jump right to it.
Better live logs

Live Worker logs now support keyword search and level filtering; long-press to copy a whole line, tap to expand the full detail and select any part of it. Pause now only freezes the view — logs keep arriving, so nothing is missing when you resume.
SQL history and favorites
D1 keeps your last 12 queries and lets you favorite the ones you reuse (saved per database). Results export to CSV in a tap, and table details now list indexes.
Generate images with Workers AI
The model playground now covers text-to-image models — type a prompt, get a picture, then share or save it.
Preview R2 objects
Tap an R2 object to preview it: images show inline, JSON is formatted automatically, and text can be searched with a match count. Oversized objects still suggest downloading instead.
Quickly bind R2 buckets
Resource bindings now cover R2 — attach an existing bucket to a Worker, and unbind it just like D1 / KV.
Smoother editing for long scripts
Rebuilt the Worker code editor’s input handling so typing stays smooth in long scripts.
One-tap workers.dev URL
When a Worker’s workers.dev subdomain is on, its full URL now shows right there — tap to open.
Quickly bind D1 / KV
Bind an existing D1 database or KV namespace to a Worker right from the bindings page — and unbind just as easily.
Fixed crash when editing long scripts
Fixed a crash that could occur when editing a longer Worker script.
Account usage overview
The overview now has a usage module — see Workers, R2, D1 and KV usage against their quotas at a glance, with plan switching and per-metric details.
Worker deployment history and delete
View a Worker’s past deployments and delete old ones, plus edit and delete Workers.
More storage management
Create and delete KV namespaces and R2 buckets, drop D1 tables, and delete Pages deployments.
Pages custom domains
Manage custom domains right inside a Pages project: add, remove, re-validate, and check DNS status — with one-tap CNAME setup when the domain’s zone is on your account.
List sorting
Workers and Pages lists can now be sorted by name (default), date created, or recently updated — your choice is remembered.
No-login developer toolbox

A set of handy network tools you can use without signing in: DNS lookup, SSL certificate inspection, HTTP headers, WHOIS, IP geolocation, a CIDR calculator and Cloudflare trace — reachable right from the login screen.
Push Center
A built-in push service: get your own endpoint and send messages to this device with a simple curl or script — with titles, groups and an inbox. No Cloudflare sign-in required.
Cloudflare alerts on your phone

Once signed in, manage your Cloudflare alert policies right here: pick the alert types you care about (DDoS, health checks, certificate expiry, Workers error rate and more) and wire them to the Push Center in one tap, so events land on this device. Requires a domain on a Pro or higher plan.
Workers AI improvements
Browse models grouped by task type, view model details, and the text-generation test run is fixed.
New Developer Platform
Workers now sits alongside Workers AI, AI Gateway, Queues, Hyperdrive, Durable Objects and Pages in a single Developer Platform hub.
Cache Rules, Rate Limiting & Email Routing
Zones gain Cache Rules and Rate Limiting rules, plus Email Routing with forwarding rules and destination addresses.
Load Balancing, Zero Trust & Bulk Redirects
New load balancers (with pool health), Zero Trust (Access apps and Gateway rule toggles), and Bulk Redirect lists and items.
AI assistant & visual WAF
A new AI assistant powered by Workers AI; WAF rules can be built visually or generated from natural language.
R2 in Files, traffic map & audit log

Browse, upload, rename, move and delete R2 objects in the system Files app; analytics adds traffic by country; Settings adds an account audit log; Pages shows deployments with one-tap retry or rollback.
Domain security suite
New SSL/TLS encryption modes and edge certificates, Universal SSL toggle, Transform Rules, IP access rules, plus HTTP/2·HTTP/3·Brotli and other performance and cache controls.
R2 upgrade & purge by URL
R2 now supports folder browsing, object copy/move, and per-bucket CORS and public access settings; cache purge adds “purge by URL”.
Home widget, live logs & wider support
A new daybreak “account overview” home widget; live tail logs are promoted to Live Updates (Android 16); Help & Feedback can attach a diagnostic log; now supports Android 9 and above.
From viewing to managing
You can now add domains, create and delete D1 databases and tunnels, manage Worker variables/secrets/triggers/domains, and a tunnel’s public hostname routes.
One-tap OAuth sign-in
Sign in with Cloudflare\'s official authorization — no API tokens to paste.
Domains · Workers · Storage
DNS, analytics, WAF, Snippets, Workers live logs, and R2/D1/KV storage — all in one place.
